title: Conocephalopsis
taxonomy: Conocephalopsis belongs to the class Lycopodiopsida, which is a group of vascular plants that includes club mosses and their relatives. It is a genus of liverworts in the family Cephaloziaceae, which is a family of leafy liverworts. Conocephalopsis liverworts are typically found in shaded, humid environments with acidic soils. They have small, leafy stems and produce spores for reproduction. Conocephalopsis is considered a relatively rare and localized genus of liverwort.
